title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: leapp-repository bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for leapp-repository is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems

fixes.description: confusing URL title in the report for removed loaded kernel driver [rhel-9]
source & target  versions allow X format on non-rhel os instead of X.Y
Investigate and adjust repomap data to cover RHEL/CS-like distros
Enable 9>10 upgrade of AWS PAYG machines
Just upgraded system to RHEL10 crashes because initramfs was not generated
Remove obsolete RPM GPG keys during Centos Stream IPU
Leapp fails while running "su - -c update-ca-trust" exit code 127 with fapolicy enabled [rhel-9]
Generalize actor (and the report) reporting non-RH signed packages
Omit rhsm related actions for non-rhel distros
Update & Set DNF stream variable for upgrades to CentOS Stream

full_text:
An update for leapp-repository is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Release Notes linked from the References section.
